canonical_definition: The latent tendency of an LLM to vary the distribution of syntactic agency in narrative framing, using passive or active constructions to shift attention toward or away from responsible actors based on persona role.

definitions.text: The latent tendency of an LLM to vary the distribution of syntactic agency in narrative framing, using passive or active constructions to shift attention toward or away from responsible actors based on persona role.
